eligible_applicant_type: Public and private colleges and universities
geographic_restrictions: Primarily focused on the United States, with some international initiatives. Specific grants may have state or regional restrictions.
project_area: Liberal arts education, civic engagement, student learning outcomes, faculty development, and educational equity.
demographic_requirements: Varies by grant program; some initiatives target minority-serving institutions, community colleges, veterans, first-generation students, and underrepresented groups.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by grant program but generally includes nonprofit organizations, higher education institutions, and community-based organizations working to enhance liberal arts education, civic engagement, and student learning outcomes. Some grants are restricted to specific states or types of institutions.
